case_title: ISABEL MCCOY VS. NICHOLAS RAZES DBA STATE OF THE ART ENGINEERING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,800.00 FILED BY MCCOY, ISABEL AS TO DEFENDANT RAZES, NICHOLAS DBA STATE OF THE ART ENGINEERING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2023 - CONTINUED TO FEB-08-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ISABEL MCCOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS RAZEL IS NOT PRESENT. LAWIUIT IS BASED ON A CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND A CORPLORATION. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN TIME TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT AND OR EXPLORE RELATIONSHIP BEETWEEN DEFENDANT RAZES AND CORPORATION. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: 2ND EXHIBIT RECEIVED (DEFENDANT NICHOLAS RAZES DBA STATE OF THE ART ENGINEERING, INC.) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: FEB-08-2024 AT 8:30AM}

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCOY, ISABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAZES, NICHOLAS DBA STATE OF THE ART ENGINEERING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-03-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. ROSEMARY MCCOY (PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER) ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF CONTACTED DEPT. 506 VIA PHONE PRIOR TO HEARING TO INFORM THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT PARTY HAS NOT BEEN SERVED AND REQUEST A CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
